summary: Comprehensive testing of redesigned Employee Portal UI. All frontend tests passed (100%). Tested enrolled view (Maria Garcia), enrollment selection view (new employee registration), enrollment flow (plan selection, tier change, add-on, enroll), and decline flow (dialog, reason selection, confirm). Backend endpoint verified to return all required data.
passed_tests: Employee Portal Enrolled View - profile card renders with user initials, name, email, employer, role, plan year
Employee Portal Enrolled View - enrollment status badge shows 'Active' for enrolled employees
Employee Portal Enrolled View - cost summary card shows Your Premium, Employer Pays, Total Plan Cost, employer coverage percentage
Employee Portal Enrolled View - enrolled plan card shows plan name, type (PPO), MV%, MEC badges, coverage tier
Employee Portal Enrolled View - deductibles section shows individual ($2,000) and family ($4,000) deductibles
Employee Portal Enrolled View - OOP max section shows individual ($7,000) and family ($14,000) out-of-pocket maximums
Employee Portal Enrolled View - copays section shows PCP ($30), Specialist ($50), ER ($300) copays
Employee Portal Enrolled View - prescriptions section shows Generic ($10), Brand ($40), Coinsurance (20%)
Employee Portal Enrolled View - premium tiers table shows all 4 tiers with 'Current' badge on enrolled tier
Employee Portal Enrollment Selection View - new employee registration with employer code H9G9PW works
Employee Portal Enrollment Selection View - profile card shows new employee info
Employee Portal Enrollment Selection View - tier selector card shows 4 coverage levels (Self Only, Employee+Spouse, Employee+Children, Family)
Employee Portal Enrollment Selection View - plan cards show plan name, type, MV%, MEC badges, deductible, PCP, Rx, OOP max, monthly cost
Employee Portal Enrollment Selection View - expand/collapse button shows full plan details (deductibles, OOP max, coinsurance, doctor visits, prescriptions, all tier pricing)
Employee Portal Enrollment Selection View - add-on cards show dental plan with monthly cost
Employee Portal Enrollment Selection View - decline button visible and clickable
Employee Portal Enrollment Selection View - enroll button shows selected plan name and monthly cost
Employee Portal Enroll Flow - tier selection updates plan pricing (Employee+Spouse shows $200/mo)
Employee Portal Enroll Flow - plan selection highlights selected plan with checkmark
Employee Portal Enroll Flow - add-on selection toggles add-on with checkmark
Employee Portal Enroll Flow - enroll button submits enrollment successfully
Employee Portal Enroll Flow - after enrollment shows enrolled view with 'Enrollment confirmed!' toast
Employee Portal Enroll Flow - enrolled view shows correct tier (Employee+Spouse) and add-on (Delta PPO Dental)
Employee Portal Decline Flow - decline button opens decline dialog
Employee Portal Decline Flow - decline dialog shows ACA compliance message
Employee Portal Decline Flow - decline reason dropdown shows all 6 reasons
Employee Portal Decline Flow - confirm decline button submits decline successfully
Employee Portal Decline Flow - after decline shows declined view with 'Coverage declined' toast
Employee Portal Decline Flow - declined view shows 'Coverage Declined' card with reason
Backend /api/enrollment/employee/my-plans returns medical_plans array with full plan details
Backend /api/enrollment/employee/my-plans returns addon_plans array
Backend /api/enrollment/employee/my-plans returns current_enrollment object
Backend /api/enrollment/employee/my-plans returns enrolled_plan_detail with premiums, contributions, copays, deductibles
Backend /api/enrollment/employee/my-plans returns decline_reasons array for ACA compliance
Backend /api/enrollment/employee/my-plans returns employer_name
seed_data_creation: Created test employees for enrollment and decline flow testing: enroll_test_ki2v86@test.com, decline_test_6o25fp@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Portal UI redesign fully tested. Enrolled view shows profile card, cost summary, plan details (copays, rx, deductibles, OOP max), premium tiers table. Enrollment selection view shows tier selector, plan cards with expand/collapse, add-ons, enroll/decline buttons. Enrollment flow: select tier -> select plan -> optionally add add-ons -> click enroll -> shows enrolled view. Decline flow: click decline -> select reason -> confirm -> shows declined view. Key data-testids: employee-portal-page, profile-card, cost-summary-card, enrolled-plan-card, copays-section, rx-section, premium-tiers-card, tier-selector-card, decline-btn, enroll-btn, confirm-decline-btn, decline-reason-select, plan-option-{id}, addon-{id}, expand-plan-{id}, enrollment-status-badge, decline-info-card, tier-{value}.

enrolled_view.profile_card: Shows user initials avatar, name, email, employer, role, plan year
enrolled_view.cost_summary_card: Shows Your Premium, Employer Pays, add-on costs, Total Plan Cost, employer coverage % with progress bar
enrolled_view.enrolled_plan_card: Shows plan name, type badge, MV%, MEC badges, coverage tier badge, deductibles, OOP max, copays, prescriptions, plan year dates
enrolled_view.premium_tiers_card: Table with Tier, Total Premium, Employer Pays, You Pay columns, current tier highlighted with 'Current' badge
enrolled_view.addon_details_card: Shows enrolled add-ons with category badge and monthly cost

enrollment_selection_view.profile_card: Compact version with initials, name, email, employer
enrollment_selection_view.tier_selector_card: 4 tier buttons: Self Only, Employee+Spouse, Employee+Children, Family
enrollment_selection_view.plan_cards: Shows plan name, type, MV%, MEC badges, quick stats (deductible, PCP, Rx, OOP max), monthly cost, employer contribution
enrollment_selection_view.expand_details: Full benefits grid: deductibles, OOP max, coinsurance, doctor visits, prescriptions, all tier pricing
enrollment_selection_view.addon_cards: Checkbox-style cards with plan name, category, carrier, monthly cost
enrollment_selection_view.enroll_button: Full-width button showing selected plan name and monthly cost
